records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, it should be okay now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Above all else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Above all else.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't the fact that you and I met like this an excellent rebuttal?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Get a hold of yourself, Swan! You won't see that sly man ever again if you get that photo back, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get a hold of yourself, Swan! You won't see that sly man ever again if you get that photo back, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I?

records.m_Talk_DEU: The fog is too dense that I lost my sense of direction.

records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what? There's a message written in blood...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Pass the fourth ordeal, and she will become iron heated in flame.</color>

records.m_Talk_FRA: F-footsteps...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to get caught if I don't hide...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: I remember everything.
